Twilio — which powers B2C SMS, two-factor authentication, customer alerts and reminders alongside other digital interactions — has positioned itself as critical infrastructure for the AI era. title: Financial Times’ Martin Wolf on the “Terrifying” Power That the US Wields
title_cn: 《金融时报》的马丁·沃尔夫谈美国拥有的“可怕”力量
summary:
The war's effect on the world's economy is at once stunning and utterly strange: even as the prices of major commodities rise, the markets seem unaffected, closing at record levels in recent weeks.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, we are joined by Martin Wolf, chief economics commentator for the Financial Times. He tells Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway why economic growth remains a constant fact of life and why he thinks the power that the US wields over the globe is "terrifying." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: S&P 500 Tops 7,500 as AI Fuels Record-Breaking Run: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 人工智能推动创纪录运行，标准普尔 500 指数突破 7,500 点：市场结束
summary: A revival of the artificial-intelligence trade kept fueling momentum in stocks, with the market also rising after retail sales showed signs of consumer strength despite a war-driven surge in energy costs.

title: US Mortgage Rates Are Little Changed Despite Surging Inflation
title_cn: 尽管通胀飙升，美国抵押贷款利率变化不大
summary: Mortgage rates in the US were little changed even as the escalating energy crisis drives inflation higher.

title: Active Debate Is Important at the Fed, Shah Says
title_cn: 沙阿表示，美联储的积极辩论很重要
summary: Investors are underpricing the prospect that the Federal Reserve may have to abandon its bias to cut interest rates. Seema Shah, Chief Global Strategist at Principal Asset Management, discusses the path forward for central banks, especially the Fed as Kevin Warsh is set to take over as chair. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: It’s not just US retail investors piling into any asset connected to space exploration. Europeans want in, too.

summary: US President Donald Trump signaled China is willing to support negotiations with Iran, as he pushes for a diplomatic resolution to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, after a commercial vessel was apparently seized near the United Arab Emirates.

title: Cuba Runs Out of Fuel, Plunging Country Into Darkness and Protests
title_cn: 古巴耗尽燃料，使国家陷入黑暗和抗议
summary: Cuba said the country has completely run out of the diesel and fuel oil it needs to keep its power plants running, with civil unrest starting to break out amid a de facto US energy blockade of the communist-run nation.

title: New Fortress Energy Takes $6.5 Billion Debt Plan to Court
title_cn: New Fortress Energy 将 65 亿美元债务计划告上法庭
summary: Billionaire Wes Edens’ New Fortress Energy Inc. won permission from a UK court to arrange creditor votes on a sweeping restructuring that will see the vast majority of the firm’s debt load converted into equity, handing ownership of the business to its lenders.

title: US-China Discussions on Farm and Oil Trade Expansion
title_cn: 美中关于扩大农产品和石油贸易的讨论
summary: Lizzy Galbraith, Senior Political Economist at Aberdeen, speaks about discussions between the US and China regarding increased trade in farm and oil sectors. The conversation focused on the potential economic and political implications of these trade talks, highlighting the significance of agricultural and energy commodities in the bilateral relationship. Galbraith offered insights into how these developments might influence market dynamics and broader geopolitical considerations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Proposal for Semiannual Reporting Faces Pushback
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会关于半年度报告的提案面临阻力
summary:
The Reddit-based retail investor community famous for launching the meme-stock phenomenon filed a public comment Tuesday opposing a proposed shift to semiannual, rather than quarterly, securities reports. 
Securities and Exchange Commission Chairman Paul Atkins unveiled the fast-tracked plan after President Donald Trump called for an end to decades-old rules mandating quarterly filing of the public disclosures known as 10-Qs.
Mike McClean, Head of US Policy at Barclays, discusses the SEC's proposal to change reporting cadence, as well as what Trump is facing when he returns home from the ongoing summit in China. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dollar’s Link to Oil Most Positive Ever as Iran Crisis Drags On
title_cn: 随着伊朗危机的持续，美元与石油的联系最为积极
summary: Eleven weeks into a Middle Eastern conflict that has shuttered a critical shipping channel and sent energy prices soaring, the US dollar’s linkage to oil prices is more positive than ever before.

title: Brookfield Says It Amassed $2 Billion Bet on SpaceX Ahead of IPO
title_cn: Brookfield 称其在 IPO 前对 SpaceX 进行了 20 亿美元的押注
summary: Investment firm Brookfield said it owns $2 billion of pre-IPO shares of Elon Musk’s SpaceX, with half on its parent company’s balance sheet and the rest held by other affiliated entities.

title: CEOs Join Xi and Trump For Banquet in Beijing

summary: CEOs including Elon Musk, Jensen Huang and Tim Cook attend a state banquet for President Donald Trump and China's President Xi Jinping at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: First Brands Windup Should Be Run by Trustee to Lower Costs, US Says
title_cn: 美国表示，第一品牌清盘应由受托人管理以降低成本
summary: Bankrupt auto-parts maker First Brands Group should be taken over by a court-supervised trustee who can finish liquidating its assets at a much lower cost than what the company’s high-priced advisers are charging, federal officials argued in a court filing.

title: Energy Hype Drives Ford Rally
title_cn: 能源炒作推动福特拉力赛
summary: Ford may be on the verge of a major breakthrough, this time outside the car business. Morgan Stanley says the the automaker may be closing in on a massive battery storage deal with hyperscalers, potentially unlocking a $10 billion high-margin energy business. Bloomberg Auto Reporter Keith Naughton joined Bloomberg Open Interest with more details. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Yen Briefly Rallies as Traders Eye Japan Intervention Risk
title_cn: 交易员关注日本干预风险，日元短暂上涨
summary: The yen jumped against the dollar on Thursday before falling back as currency traders brace for possible action by Japanese authorities to support the currency.

title: Virtu Starts Trading on Kalshi as Event Bets Draw in Wall Street
title_cn: 随着华尔街赛事投注抽签，Virtu 开始在 Kalshi 上交易
summary: Virtu Financial is joining a small but growing list of institutional market-making firms trading on prediction markets, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: StubHub, Viking Holdings Rise on Q1 Earnings | Stock Movers
title_cn: StubHub 和 Viking Holdings 第一季度收益上涨 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- StubHub (STUB) shares are rising after the ticketing company reported better-than-expected first quarter results and reiterated its annual forecast. Morgan Stanley analyst notes that gross merchandise sales (GMS) and revenue should improve in the second half of the year. 
- Viking Holdings (VIK) shares are rallying after the cruise-line operator reported first-quarter yields above estimates. Analysts cited “impressive” 2027 bookings and executive management changes that helped remove an overhang.
- Watches of Switzerland (WOSGF) shares are higher and are trading at the highest since early 2024, after the watch retailer said annual adjusted Ebit will be ahead of its previous guidance. Analysts see the confident outlook for FY27 should lift consensus estimates, while Barclays hiked its price target on the stock to a new Street-high. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vitol Offers Iraqi Oil Outside Hormuz in Sign Ships Are Exiting
title_cn: 维托尔在霍尔木兹以外地区提供伊拉克石油，迹象表明船只正在撤离
summary: Vitol Group is offering Iraqi Basrah crude to customers, people with knowledge of the matter said, in a sign that some shipments may have successfully made it out of the Persian Gulf.

title: Invesco CEO on Private Assets, QQQ Growth and Nasdaq Partnership
title_cn: 景顺首席执行官谈私募资产、QQQ 增长和纳斯达克合作伙伴关系
summary: Invesco President and CEO Andrew Schlossberg says clients are leaning into market volatility and sees the QQQ as a key US bellwether. Speaking with Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Schlossberg also discusses private markets and the firm's partnership with the Nasdaq. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Farmers Dial Crop Adjusters as Wild Weather Hammers Wheat
title_cn: 美国农民拨打作物调整员，因为恶劣的天气锤击了小麦
summary: From drought to ping-pong size hail and unseasonable warmth, weather extremes have wheat farmers reaching for their phones to ring their insurance adjusters to assess the viability of their crops.

title: Oil Steady After Trump-Xi Talks as Iran War Remains in Limbo
title_cn: 特朗普与习近平会谈后油价稳定，伊朗战争仍悬而未决
summary: Oil steadied following a meeting between US President Donald Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping where discussions included the war in Iran and increased oil ties between the two nations.

title: Oil Flows Through Hormuz Creep Higher as More Supertankers Exit
title_cn: 随着更多超级油轮退出，流经霍尔木兹的石油流量攀升
summary: The number of supertankers hauling unsanctioned oil through the Strait of Hormuz has shown signs of rising in recent days, offering limited relief to an oil market that’s suffered the largest supply disruption in history.

title: India Condemns Attack and Sinking of Ship in the Gulf of Oman
title_cn: 印度谴责阿曼湾船只袭击和沉没事件
summary: India condemned an attack on one of its vessels in the Gulf of Oman, which sunk after it was set ablaze, calling the incident “unacceptable.”

title: Carney Rolls Out Pitch to Double Canada’s Electricity Output
title_cn: 卡尼推出使加拿大发电量翻一番的宣传活动
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney published a strategy that aims to double Canada’s electricity generation by 2050, including adjusting its clean electricity rules to give more flexibility on power generation using natural gas.

title: India Takes More Measures to Curb Gold Imports
title_cn: 印度采取更多措施遏制黄金进口
summary: India has further tightened rules for importing gold into the country, as Prime Minister Narendra Modi steps up efforts to defend the rupee amid the Middle East war.

title: Private Credit BDC Redemptions Exceed Fundraising for First Time
title_cn: 私人信贷 BDC 赎回金额首次超过筹款金额
summary: Non-traded private credit funds handed more money back to investors than they raised in the first quarter — the first time outflows from the vehicles have surpassed inflows.

title: Gold Fluctuates as Market Weighs Federal Reserve Rate Path
title_cn: 随着市场权衡美联储利率走势，黄金波动
summary: Gold swung between gains and losses as investors weighed the Federal Reserve’s interest-rate path after US data this week showed a war-driven surge in inflation.

title: Fermi Changes Rules to Thwart Ex-CEO’s Push to Remake Board
title_cn: 费米改变规则以阻止前首席执行官重组董事会的努力
summary: US power-plant developer Fermi Inc. changed its rules around director appointments to block efforts by its former chief executive officer to reshape the company’s board.

title: AI Investment Drives Market Resilience Despite Headwinds
title_cn: 尽管面临阻力，人工智能投资仍能推动市场弹性
summary: Stephanie Aliaga, JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist, discusses the dominant influence of AI-related capital expenditures on the current market dynamics. Despite challenges such as rising oil prices, higher interest rates, and a sluggish economy, the AI sector is propelling earnings growth and investor focus. Aliaga highlights that 2026 is poised to be a landmark year for agentic AI, underscoring the technology's pivotal role in sustaining market momentum amid broader economic uncertainties. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-China Tech Trade & Export Controls with Fabian Villalobos
title_cn: Fabian Villalobos 的中美技术贸易和出口管制
summary: US and Chinese leaders in Beijing, scheduled for approximately 24 hours from the broadcast. Attention is drawn to the Korean equity market, which has rebounded from early losses largely due to positive movement in Samsung Electronics shares.  Jensen Huang, CEO of Nvidia, who joined President Trump on Air Force One en route to Beijing, signaling the importance of technology discussions at the summit. The conversation centers on semiconductor export controls and the potential for negotiations on easing these restrictions. While Nvidia can access some parts of the Chinese market, the most advanced chips remain restricted, and China's growing self-reliance and production of cheaper chip models complicate the dynamics. The last-minute inclusion of Jensen Huang suggests shifting priorities in the summit agenda, with a focus on tech trade issues and whether China will cooperate on loosening export controls. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How AI Aims to Fix Healthcare Access
title_cn: 人工智能如何解决医疗保健问题
summary: Rezilient CEO Dr. Danish Nagda says the healthcare system is at a tipping point. He joins Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about how hybrid “cloud clinics,” employer-driven care, and AI-powered doctors could eliminate long wait times, cut costs, and make switching doctors a thing of the past. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Should Focus on AI's Long-Term Value Migration: JPMorgan AM
title_cn: 摩根大通：投资者应关注人工智能的长期价值迁移
summary: Joanna Shen of JPMorgan Asset Management says the firm believes we are "in the early adoption AI phase." She tells Bloomberg Television that AI agents are "the first technology in decades that can supercharge the labor inputs." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mobile Carriers Join Forces to Boost Coverage in Dead Zones
title_cn: 移动运营商联手扩大死区覆盖范围
summary: AT&T Inc., T-Mobile US Inc. and Verizon Communications Inc. announced a rare joint venture Thursday that aims to make satellite capabilities more widely available to mobile phone customers.

title: $300 Billion AI Debt Binge Spreads From Wall Street to Tokyo
title_cn: 3000 亿美元的人工智能债务狂潮从华尔街蔓延到东京
summary: Bankers were still putting the final touches on Alphabet Inc.’s blockbuster $17 billion of bond sales when word started to spread Monday morning on Wall Street: the company is already hawking more debt.

title: Samanth Subramanian on the Undersea Cables That Keep the Internet Alive | Odd Lots
title_cn: Samanth Subramanian 谈维持互联网活力的海底电缆 |零股
summary: Underneath the world's oceans, miles and miles of fiber optic-cables send packets of information from one location to the next, serving as the backbone of the internet as we know it. This infrastructure is delicate, too: Memorably, a 2022 volcanic eruption cut off the island of Tonga from web access for an extended period of time. Samanth Subramanian is the author of The Web Beneath the Waves: The Fragile Cables that Connect Our World, a recent book that explains, in detail, that the Internet is, and has never been, truly weightless or wireless. In fact, the system in place right now is pretty old school and resembles the telegraph cable network of yore. We talk to Subramanian about the strange contradictions of the undersea cable system, how much basic marine geography — like the Strait of Hormuz or the Suez Canal — informs where cables are laid, and how hard it is protect this vulnerable and vital infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cisco Jumps Most Since 2011 on Sales Outlook, Restructuring Plan
title_cn: 思科在销售前景和重组计划方面实现了自 2011 年以来的最大涨幅
summary: Cisco Systems Inc. jumped by the most in more than 14 years after the company delivered a better-than-anticipated sales forecast and announced plans to cut thousands of jobs, an attempt to focus on the fast-growing AI market.

title: Amazon’s AI Success Sends Stock Racing Toward $3 Trillion Club
title_cn: 亚马逊人工智能的成功推动股价冲向 3 万亿美元俱乐部
summary: Investors are growing increasingly optimistic about Amazon.com Inc.’s position in artificial intelligence, lighting a fire under the stock and sending the company’s market capitalization soaring toward the rarefied $3 trillion level.

title: JPMorgan's Quinsee Says Investors Should Look Beyond Big Tech for Strong Returns
title_cn: 摩根大通的昆西表示，投资者应该超越大型科技公司以获得强劲回报
summary: Paul Quinsee, global head of equities at JPMorgan Asset Management, says investors can find strong returns by looking beyond the big tech stocks that are capturing most of the market's attention now. He speaks with Jonathan Ferro and Lisa Abramowicz on ``Bloomberg Surveillance.'' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Africa E-Commerce Giant Jumia to Cut Workforce Due to AI
title_cn: 非洲电商巨头 Jumia 将因人工智能裁员
summary: Jumia Technologies AG is planning to cut an initial 10% of its workforce of about 2,000 people as the African e-commerce giant implements artificial intelligence across its departments, Chief Executive Officer Francis Dufay said.

title: Motorola’s Razr Fold Is a Solid Phone Arriving at the Worst Time
title_cn: 摩托罗拉 Razr Fold 是一款在最糟糕的时间上市的手机
summary: The company’s first book-style foldable has a lot to recommend it, but a wave of fresh competition is coming soon.

title: Newsom’s California Budget Bolstered by Extra Cash from AI Boom
title_cn: 人工智能繁荣带来的额外现金支撑了纽瑟姆的加州预算
summary: California Governor Gavin Newsom unveiled a revised budget that shows no deficit for this year and next, as the state draws another boost from the technology and artificial-intelligence boom.

title: Citadel's Esposito Sees Costs of AI Alongside Trading Benefits
title_cn: Citadel 的 Esposito 看到了人工智能的成本和交易优势
summary: Citadel Securities is seeing strong returns from ramping up investment in AI as the soaring cost of GPUs and infrastructure is raising barriers for new competitors. Jim Esposito, President of Citadel Securities speaks in a wide-ranging interview at the Bloomberg Markets and Banking Summit in New York on April 22nd, 2026 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Has Become Value in Markets, Julian Emanuel Says
title_cn: 朱利安·伊曼纽尔表示，科技已成为市场价值
summary: Julian Emanuel, chief equity and quantitative strategist at Evercore ISI, sees “exceptional earnings and reasonable valuations” driving investors to tech stocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging-Market Stocks Rise as Alibaba, TSMC Join AI Hot Streak
title_cn: 阿里巴巴、台积电加入人工智能热潮新兴市场股市上涨
summary: Emerging-market stocks advanced for the third day this week as technology companies in Taiwan and China joined a hot streak by South Korean peers, buoyed by optimism that talks between the US and China will improve trade ties and boost demand for artificial intelligence-related hardware and services.

title: Powell McCormick Is Fast Becoming Meta’s Face on the Global Stage
title_cn: 鲍威尔·麦考密克 (Powell McCormick) 正迅速成为 Meta 在全球舞台上的代言人
summary: The social media company’s vice chair is part of the group traveling with Trump to China

title: Revolut Eyes Private Bank Arm for UK, Europe to Push Into Wealth
title_cn: Revolut 着眼于英国和欧洲的私人银行部门，以进军财富领域
summary: Revolut is looking to open up a private bank in UK and some European countries in an effort to reel in revenue from wealthy individuals, according to a person with knowledge of the matter.

title: The Woman Selling Longevity to Women Left Out of the Boys Club
title_cn: 向被排除在男孩俱乐部之外的女性兜售长寿的女人
summary: Influencer Kayla Barnes-Lentz has built a loyal following arguing that wellness protocols based on male-dominated science don’t cut it for half the population.

title: DayOne Is Said to Consider Upsizing Funding Round to $4 Billion
title_cn: 据称 DayOne 考虑将融资规模扩大至 40 亿美元
summary: DayOne Data Centers Ltd. is considering upsizing its Series C funding round to more than $4 billion, according to people familiar with the situation, amid strong investor interest in assets supporting an artificial intelligence boom.

title: Nvidia Partner Hon Hai Profit Jumps With AI Sales Boost
title_cn: Nvidia 合作伙伴鸿海利润因 AI 销售增长而大幅增长
summary: Nvidia Corp.’s major server assembly partner Hon Hai Precision Industry Co. reported a stronger-than-expected increase in quarterly profit, highlighting sustained spending on hardware essential for AI.

title: Telefónica Shares Jump After Brazil, Spain Drive Profit Growth
title_cn: 巴西和西班牙推动利润增长，西班牙电信股价上涨
summary: Telefónica SA shares jumped the most in almost three months as the Spanish carrier reported higher first-quarter earnings, boosted by growth in Brazil and easing competition in Spain.

title: Revolut Gets UK Approval to Expand Investments for Customers
title_cn: Revolut 获得英国批准扩大客户投资
summary: Revolut Ltd. has received approval from UK regulators to expand its investment offerings in the country, as the fintech firm seeks to win more wealthy clients.

title: Adtek Is Said to Explore Hong Kong IPO at $4 Billion Valuation
title_cn: 传Adtek将探索香港IPO 估值40亿美元
summary: Shenzhen Adtek Technology Co. is considering an initial public offering in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a wave of Chinese listings by businesses related to data centers and artificial intelligence.

title: Cerebras Raises $5.55 Billion in Year’s Biggest IPO
title_cn: Cerebras 完成年度最大 IPO 融资 55.5 亿美元
summary: Artificial intelligence chipmaker Cerebras Systems Inc. raised $5.55 billion in its US initial public offering. The company priced its shares at $185 each, giving Cerebras a market value of about $40 billion, based on the shares offered and outstanding in its filings. Bloomberg’s Neil Campling reports.

title: World’s Biggest Stock Rally Ignites Speculative Mania in Korea
title_cn: 全球最大规模股市上涨引发韩国投机狂潮
summary: In South Korea’s $4.6 trillion stock market, signs of euphoria are popping up everywhere.

title: London Office Leasing Rebounds on Demand Fueled by Finance Firms
title_cn: 金融公司推动伦敦写字楼租赁需求反弹
summary: London office leasing bounced back from Covid-era lows, with tenant floor-space expansions reaching a six-year high on rising demand from finance and professional services firms, according to broker Cushman & Wakefield.

title: 'Better Than Ever': Trump, Xi Hail Ties at Beijing Summit | The China Show 5/14/2026
title_cn: “比以往任何时候都更好”：特朗普和习近平在北京峰会上赞扬关系中国展 2026 年 5 月 14 日
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, David Ingles and Yvonne Man give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Boeing Wins 200-Jet Plane Order From China, Trump Says
title_cn: 特朗普称波音赢得中国 200 架喷气式飞机订单
summary: China agreed to buy 200 planes from Boeing Co., President Donald Trump said, in a multibillion-dollar deal that would mark the nation’s first purchase of US-made commercial jets in nearly a decade.

title: Burnham’s Path to Challenge Starmer Opens as MP to Quit
title_cn: 伯纳姆挑战斯塔默之路开启，国会议员辞职
summary: Labour Member of Parliament Josh Simons is set to announce plans to step down from his seat in Greater Manchester, opening up a path for Mayor Andy Burnham to return to Parliament and seek the prime minister’s job.

title: Al-Zaidi Pledged to Restrict Weapons in State Hands
title_cn: 扎伊迪承诺限制国家手中的武器
summary: Iraqi lawmakers all but confirmed Ali al-Zaidi as prime minister, following a push by US President Donald Trump to have the businessman and former banker lead the country, according to the parliament media office.

title: Taiwan Becomes Central Issue Between Trump, Xi
title_cn: 台湾成为特朗普与习近平之间的核心问题
summary: President Donald Trump highlighted the need for China buy more from US farmers during his first day of meeting with Xi Jinping. Xi made Taiwan a central issue. Elizabeth Economy, Hargrove Senior Fellow at the Hoover Institution at Stanford University, gives us her takeaways of the summit so far. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Tells Allies of Possible Halt of Troop Rotation to Europe
title_cn: 美国告诉盟友可能停止向欧洲轮换部队
summary: Lithuanian Defense Minister Robertas Kaunas said the US has informed its allies about a possible pause in the rotation of troops to Europe as the Pentagon reviews deployment plans on the continent.

title: Magyar Slams Secret $4.3 Billion Orban-Era Defense Deal
title_cn: 马扎尔猛烈抨击欧尔班时代43亿美元的秘密国防协议
summary: Hungary’s former government under Viktor Orban signed a 1.3 trillion forint ($4.3 billion) contract with 4iG Nyrt. weeks before it lost power, one of the biggest public procurements in the nation’s history, according to news website HVG.

title: Warsaw Registers First Same-Sex Marriage After Court Verdicts
title_cn: 法庭判决后华沙登记第一例同性婚姻
summary: Warsaw has registered its first same-sex marriage after a Polish court opened up a path for the country, where such unions are banned, to recognize those legally conducted in other European Union member states.

title: Xi’s Threat to Trump Cements Taiwan as Top US-China Risk
title_cn: 习近平对特朗普的威胁巩固了台湾作为美中最大风险的地位
summary: After Xi Jinping regaled Donald Trump with goose-stepping soldiers and flag-waving children, the Chinese leader’s warning that Taiwan could lead to “clashes” between the superpowers amounted to a thunderclap in the choreographed world of Communist Party politics.

title: Xi Warns Trump of Possible ‘Clashes’ If Taiwan Issue Mishandled
title_cn: 习近平警告特朗普如果台湾问题处理不当可能发生“冲突”
summary:
Xi Jinping warned Donald Trump of a potential conflict if the Taiwan issue is mismanaged, in blunt remarks that punctured an otherwise cordial start to the first trip to China by a sitting US president in nearly a decade.

The two leaders spoke for nearly two-and-a-half hours at the Great Hall of the People on Thursday, after a welcome ceremony in central Beijing that included honor guards, a formal procession and dozens of children waving flags and cheering enthusiastically. While that meeting was still underway, China released a readout of Xi’s remarks that thrust self-ruled Taiwan into the spotlight.

Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern reports from Beijing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Russian Operation Using AI Fakes To Target Voters
title_cn: 俄罗斯利用人工智能假货来瞄准选民
summary: On today’s Big Take, investigative reporter Stephanie Baker tells Sarah Holder about Storm-1516, a Russian group behind a new wave of online disinformation — and what AI-powered fakes and weakened social media guardrails mean for the 2026 US midterms. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump, Xi Raise a Toast at End of Day One
title_cn: 特朗普和习近平在第一天结束时举杯祝酒
summary: President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping toasted each other at a state dinner in the Great Hall of the People in Beijing after a day of meetings. Trump thanked Xi for his hospitality and invited him to the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazil Police Arrest Master CEO’s Father as Scandal Deepens
title_cn: 随着丑闻加深，巴西警方逮捕了 Master CEO 的父亲
summary: Brazil’s federal police arrested the father of former Banco Master SA Chief Executive Officer Daniel Vorcaro, deepening a scandal surrounding the lender at the center of a massive fraud probe.

title: What to Expect From the Second Round of US-China Talks
title_cn: 对第二轮中美会谈有何期待
summary: Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern reports on what to expect from the second round of meetings between President Donald Trump and his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping. She previews an interview to be held with the US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer and why readouts on day one were so different from both countries.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Authorities Moving to End Fraud Cases Against Gautam Adani
title_cn: 美国当局着手结束针对高塔姆·阿达尼的欺诈案件
summary: US authorities are moving to resolve the fraud charges against Indian billionaire Gautam Adani, according to people familiar with the matter, and end a criminal case that’s hung over Asia’s richest person for more than a year.

title: US Forces Destroyed Most of Iran’s Sea Mines, Centcom Chief Says
title_cn: 美国中央司令部司令称，美军摧毁了伊朗大部分海雷
summary: The US has destroyed more than 90% of Iran’s inventory of around 8,000 naval mines, the commander of US forces in the Middle East told lawmakers on Thursday, in a written statement that did not address Tehran’s continued control of the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: Canada Court Quashes Alberta Separatists’ Bid for Referendum
title_cn: 加拿大法院驳回艾伯塔省分离主义者的公投申请
summary: An Alberta court ruled that political activists can’t proceed with a petition to force a vote on seceding from Canada because the government failed to meet its duty to consult with Indigenous peoples.

title: What It Would Take for Labour to Replace Keir Starmer
title_cn: 工党需要什么才能取代凯尔·斯塔默
summary: UK Health Secretary Wes Streeting’s decision to quit the cabinet nudges the governing Labour Party toward uncharted territory.

title: India Bans Sugar Exports for Four Months to Protect Supply
title_cn: 印度禁止糖出口四个月以保护供应
summary: India, the world’s second-largest sugar producer, has banned exports for more than four months, according to an official notice, as the government seeks to protect local supplies.

title: Higher-Ethanol Gasoline Wins House Vote in Biofuels Boost
title_cn: 高乙醇汽油在生物燃料推动中赢得众议院投票
summary: The US House of Representatives passed legislation to allow year-round, nationwide sales of higher-ethanol E15 gasoline, handing a long-sought win to farm groups eager to boost demand for swelling corn supplies.

title: Ramaphosa Readies Court Fight as Impeachment Process Takes Shape
title_cn: 随着弹劾程序的形成，拉马福萨准备法庭诉讼
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa is preparing to mount a two-pronged legal challenge to block an impeachment hearing into an alleged cover-up of a burglary at his game farm.

title: Russian Oil Price at Highest Since 2023 Boosts Kremlin Windfall
title_cn: 俄罗斯石油价格创2023年以来最高水平，为克里姆林宫带来意外之财
summary: Russia is getting a further boost from the Iran war as the price for its flagship Urals oil export blend reached the highest since October 2023 for tax purposes this month.

title: Starmer Rival Streeting Quits in Bid to Push Prime Minister Out
title_cn: 斯塔默的竞争对手斯特里廷退出，试图将总理赶下台
summary: Wes Streeting resigned as Keir Starmer’s health secretary, paving the way for him to challenge the UK prime minister for his job.

title: Kushner Disappoints Mideast Clients Who Spent Millions Seeking Sway
title_cn: 库什纳让花费数百万美元寻求影响力的中东客户感到失望
summary: Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the UAE backed Affinity Partners in hopes of gaining White House influence and investment returns. The US war with Iran that they opposed has shown the constraints of that approach.

title: Miran Says a Transition at the Fed Is Important
title_cn: 米兰表示美联储的过渡很重要
summary: Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran says outgoing Chair Jerome Powell could help create a smooth transition with his successor, Kevin Warsh, by staying on the central bank’s Board of governors. Powell is staying on the board after his term expires Friday. Miran speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Streeting Quits, Paving Way for UK Leadership Bid
title_cn: Streeting退出，为英国领导权争夺铺平道路
summary: Wes Streeting resigned as UK Health Secretary, paving the way for him to challenge Keir Starmer for his job as prime minister. Streeting’s departure raises the prospect of an imminent leadership contest. Bloomberg's Vonnie Quinn has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi Tells US CEOs on Trump Visit That China Will Open Up More
title_cn: 习近平在特朗普访华期间告诉美国首席执行官，中国将进一步开放
summary: Xi Jinping signaled China is moving toward greater openness, striking an upbeat note during his meeting with US business leaders accompanying Donald Trump as the two presidents wrapped up morning talks that featured more divisive issues like trade and Taiwan.

title: Xi Warns Trump of Possible ‘Clashes’ If Taiwan Issue Mishandled
title_cn: 习近平警告特朗普如果台湾问题处理不当可能发生“冲突”
summary: Xi Jinping warned Donald Trump of a potential conflict if the Taiwan issue is mismanaged, in blunt remarks that punctured an otherwise cordial start to the first trip to China by a sitting US president in nearly a decade.
